archimate:BusinessService.name: Immersive Urban Experimentation Service
archimate:BusinessService.documentation: A great strength of a Digital Twin is the experience aspect. These experiences go beyond simply observing data and models; they enable people to virtually experiment, learn, and understand how something looks or functions. This is achieved by users interacting with a virtual copy. The interaction can take place in different ways. User-friendliness and an intuitive interface that makes it easy for users to navigate and perform the necessary actions are also important.
